transcript.content: hey... today has been such a mess already. woke up late, spilled coffee all over my favorite shirt, and just feel super overwhelmed and stressed out before my day has even properly started tbh.

Why so early ? It's only 3:30 in the morning here , and there are plenty of people here who are ready to meet up with you to talk about things and or take a couple of questions about things they'll be asked for

wait lol 3:30 AM?? where even are you? anyway i'm literally sitting here trying to distract myself by bingeing the new season of that reality show Love is Blind and honestly these people are making me feel so much better about my own life choices
You're not having anxiety, what you're your options ?

no, i definitely am anxious lol. like i said, my morning started off so stressful with spilling coffee everywhere and running super late. the tv show is just a distraction so i don't panic about all the work i'm falling behind on
there?
i'm fine
? is taking, or any alternatives? how demanding what? what's the ongoing, not writing, or anything, how you?

but seriously though, do you actually remember what i was stressed about this morning, or did your brain totally short-circuit?
